rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF VIRGIA M. BERRY, AKA VIRGIA MAE BERRY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Further Answers To Form Interrogatories Propounded To Willie Ann Davis, And Deeming Requests For Admissions Admitted; Separate Statements; Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Richard A Canatella With Exhibits; Request For Judicial Notice; Proof Of Mail Service
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Wednesday, April 8, 2009. Petitioner Lee McGlothin and Florence McGlothin's Motion for order compelling further answers to form interrogatories propounded to Willie Ann Davis, granted in part, denied in part, as follows: Within seven days of the date of service of this order, respondent shall serve verified, supplemental responses as set forth; Form Interrogatory. No.2.3 Granted. No.12.1 Granted; respondent shall provide a verified, code compliant response. No.12.2 Granted; respondent shall provide a verified, code compliant response. No.12.4 Granted; respondent shall provide a verified, code compliant response. No.12.5 Denied. No.12.6 Granted; respondent shall provide a verified, code compliant response. No.14.1 Denied without prejudice to further follow-up discovery. No.17.1 Granted; respondent shall provide a verified, code compliant response to interrogatory 17.1 and its subparts. = (610/PS)
